SLIMEBOSS-CHOMP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
A random Tackle in your [gold]Hand[/gold] is free to play this {IfUpgraded:show:combat|turn}.
SLIMEBOSS-CHOMP.title: Chomp
SLIMEBOSS-COMBO_TACKLE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Take {SelfDamage:diff()} damage.
Add a random Tackle into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
It's free to play this turn.
SLIMEBOSS-COMBO_TACKLE.title: Combo Tackle
SLIMEBOSS-CONSULT_PLAYBOOK.description:
Gain {Cards:diff()} random Tackle cards.
They cost {Energy:diff()} less {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} this combat.
SLIMEBOSS-CONSULT_PLAYBOOK.title: Consult Playbook
SLIMEBOSS-CORROSIVE_SPIT.title: Corrosive Spit
SLIMEBOSS-DEFEND_SLIME_BOSS.title: Defend
SLIMEBOSS-DIVIDE_CONQUER.title: Divide Conquer
SLIMEBOSS-DOUBLE_LICK.title: Double Lick
SLIMEBOSS-DOUSE_IN_SLIME.description:
Apply {GoopPower:diff()} [gold]Goop[/gold].
The next Attack used on this enemy does not remove [gold]Goop[/gold].
SLIMEBOSS-DOUSE_IN_SLIME.title: Douse in Slime
SLIMEBOSS-DUPLICATED_FORM.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} each turn.
|}The first card each turn that targets enemies is played twice.
SLIMEBOSS-DUPLICATED_FORM.title: Duplicated Form
SLIMEBOSS-EQUALIZE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Heal {EqualizePower:diff()} HP.
[gold]Consume [/gold]- Play this twice.
Exhaust.
SLIMEBOSS-EQUALIZE.title: Equalize
SLIMEBOSS-FLAME_TACKLE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Take {SelfDamage:diff()} damage.
Your Tackle cards deal {FlameTacklePower:diff()} additional damage this combat.
SLIMEBOSS-FLAME_TACKLE.title: Flame Tackle
SLIMEBOSS-FORM_OF_WALL.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Apply {GoopPower:diff()} [gold]Goop[/gold] to all enemies intending to attack.
SLIMEBOSS-FORM_OF_WALL.title: Form of Wall
SLIMEBOSS-FORWARD_TACKLE.title: Forward Tackle
SLIMEBOSS-GLOP_CHOP.title: Glop Chop
SLIMEBOSS-GLUTTONY.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Innate.
|}The first time you [gold]Consume each turn[/gold], gain a [gold]Lick[/gold].
SLIMEBOSS-GLUTTONY.title: Gluttony
SLIMEBOSS-GOOP_ARMOR.title: Goop Armor
SLIMEBOSS-GOOP_SPRAY.title: Goop Spray
SLIMEBOSS-GROW.description: Lose 1 Slime slot in exchange for {GrowPower:diff()} Strength and {GrowPower:diff()} Dexterity.
SLIMEBOSS-GROW.title: Grow
SLIMEBOSS-GROWTH_PUNCH.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Consume [/gold]- Increase this card's effects by {GrowthPunchPower:diff()} this combat.
SLIMEBOSS-GROWTH_PUNCH.title: Growth Punch
SLIMEBOSS-HAUNTING_LICK.title: Haunting Lick
SLIMEBOSS-HUNGRY_TACKLE.title: Hungry Tackle
SLIMEBOSS-IT_LOOKS_TASTY.title: It Looks Tasty
SLIMEBOSS-JUST_DESSERTS.title: Just Desserts
SLIMEBOSS-LEAD_BY_EXAMPLE.description: The first {IfUpgraded:show:{LeadByExamplePower:diff()} cards|card} you play each turn that targets enemies also {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Command[/gold].|[gold]Commands[/gold].}
SLIMEBOSS-LEAD_BY_EXAMPLE.title: Lead By Example
SLIMEBOSS-LEECHING_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Consume[/gold] - Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the enemy's [gold]Goop[/gold].
SLIMEBOSS-LEECHING_STRIKE.title: Leeching Strike
SLIMEBOSS-LEECH_ENERGY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Consume [/gold]- Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards:plural:a card|{Cards:diff()} cards}.
SLIMEBOSS-LEECH_ENERGY.title: Leech Energy
SLIMEBOSS-LEECH_LIFE.description:
Ethereal.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Heal HP equal to unblocked damage.
Exhaust.
SLIMEBOSS-LEECH_LIFE.title: Leech Life
SLIMEBOSS-LEVEL_UP.title: Level Up
SLIMEBOSS-LIQUIDATE.title: Liquidate
SLIMEBOSS-MASS_FEED.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
If Fatal, raise your Max HP by {MassFeedPower:diff()}.
Exhaust.
SLIMEBOSS-MASS_FEED.title: Mass Feed
SLIMEBOSS-MASS_REPURPOSE.description:
[gold]Absorb ALL Slimes[/gold]. Split into a random [gold]Specialist for each[/gold].{IfUpgraded:show: [gold]Command them[/gold].|}
Exhaust.
SLIMEBOSS-MASS_REPURPOSE.title: Mass Repurpose
SLIMEBOSS-MEGA_LICK.title: Mega-Lick
SLIMEBOSS-MINION_MASTER.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Innate.
|}Whenever you play a card with [gold]Command[/gold], [gold]Command again[/gold].
SLIMEBOSS-MINION_MASTER.title: Minion Master
SLIMEBOSS-NIBBLE_AND_LICK.title: Nibble And Lick
SLIMEBOSS-ONE_TWO_COMBO.title: One-Two Combo
SLIMEBOSS-OOZE_BATH.description: At the start of this enemy's turn, apply {OozeBathPower:diff()} [gold]Goop[/gold] to it.
SLIMEBOSS-OOZE_BATH.title: Ooze Bath
SLIMEBOSS-OPENING_TACKLE.title: Opening Tackle
SLIMEBOSS-OVEREXERT.title: Overexert
SLIMEBOSS-PILE_ON.title: Pile On
SLIMEBOSS-PREPARE.title: Prepare
SLIMEBOSS-PREPARE_CRUSH.description:
Next turn, gain *SLIME {IfUpgraded:show:*CRUSH+, {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}|[gold]CRUSH[/gold],} {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} and {PrepareCrushPower:diff()} Strength.
Exhaust.
SLIMEBOSS-PREPARE_CRUSH.title: Prepare: Crush
SLIMEBOSS-PRESS_THE_ATTACK.title: Press the Attack
SLIMEBOSS-PROTECT_THE_BOSS.description: Prevent the next {IfUpgraded:show:2 times|time} you would be damaged by an enemy attack, [gold]Absorbing your leading Slime instead[/gold].
SLIMEBOSS-PROTECT_THE_BOSS.title: Protect the Boss
SLIMEBOSS-QUICK_SNACK.title: Quick Snack
SLIMEBOSS-RAIN_OF_GOOP.description: Apply {GoopPower:diff()} [gold]Goop[/gold] to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
SLIMEBOSS-RAIN_OF_GOOP.title: Rain of Goop
SLIMEBOSS-RALLY_THE_TROOPS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The next {RallyTheTroopsPower:diff()} cards played this turn trigger a [gold]Command[/gold].
SLIMEBOSS-RALLY_THE_TROOPS.title: Rally the Troops
SLIMEBOSS-RECKLESSNESS.title: Recklessness
SLIMEBOSS-RECOLLECT.title: Recollect
SLIMEBOSS-RECYCLING.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Innate.
|}At the start of your turn, [gold]Exhume a random [/gold]"Lick" card.
SLIMEBOSS-RECYCLING.title: Recycling
SLIMEBOSS-REFORMATION.title: Reformation
SLIMEBOSS-REPLICATION.title: Replication
SLIMEBOSS-REPURPOSE.title: Repurpose
SLIMEBOSS-ROLL_THROUGH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
You do not take damage from the next {RollThroughPower:diff()} "Tackle" cards.
SLIMEBOSS-ROLL_THROUGH.title: Roll Through
SLIMEBOSS-SAMPLING_LICK.title: Sampling Lick
SLIMEBOSS-SCHLURP.title: Schlurp
SLIMEBOSS-SERVE_PROTECT.title: Serve Protect
SLIMEBOSS-SHAPE_OF_PUDDLE.title: Shape Of Puddle
SLIMEBOSS-SLIME_BRAWL.description:
Play the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]. Repeat for each of your spawned Slimes.
Exhaust.
SLIMEBOSS-SLIME_BRAWL.title: Slime Brawl
SLIMEBOSS-SLIME_SLAP.title: Slime Slap
SLIMEBOSS-SLIME_SPIKES.title: Slime Spikes
SLIMEBOSS-SLIME_TAP.title: Slime Tap
SLIMEBOSS-SPEAR_TACKLE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Take {SelfDamage:diff()} damage.
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
SLIMEBOSS-SPEAR_TACKLE.title: Spear Tackle
SLIMEBOSS-SPLIT.title: Split
SLIMEBOSS-SPLIT_BRUISER.title: Split: Bruiser
SLIMEBOSS-SPLIT_GUERILLA.title: Split Guerilla
SLIMEBOSS-SPLIT_LEECHING.title: Split: Leeching
SLIMEBOSS-SPLIT_MIRE.title: Split: Mire
SLIMEBOSS-SPLIT_SPECIALIST.title: Split: Specialist
SLIMEBOSS-SPREADING_SLIME.title: Spreading Slime
SLIMEBOSS-STRIKE_SLIME_BOSS.title: Strike
SLIMEBOSS-TACKLE.title: Tackle
SLIMEBOSS-TEAMWORK.title: Teamwork
SLIMEBOSS-TONGUE_LASH.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Deals {TongueLashPower:diff()} additional damage for each Exhausted "Lick" card.
SLIMEBOSS-TONGUE_LASH.title: Tongue Lash
SLIMEBOSS-VICIOUS_TACKLE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Take {SelfDamage:diff()} damage.
This gains twice the damage bonus {IfUpgraded:show:AND healing |}from [gold]Goop[/gold].
SLIMEBOSS-VICIOUS_TACKLE.title: Vicious Tackle
SLIMEBOSS-WASTE_NOT.title: Waste Not
SLIMEBOSS-LICK.title: Lick
